epics.title: User Authentication
epics.summary: Implement secure user authentication and authorization.
epics.description: Develop the user authentication system using React for the frontend implementation and FastAPI for the backend services. The system will handle user registrations, logins, password management, and OAuth integrations for social logins. Ensure that PostgreSQL is used for securely storing user credentials and profile information.

epics.title: Insurance Policy Data Model
epics.summary: Design and implement the insurance policy data model.
epics.description: Create the data model for insurance policies in PostgreSQL. Define schema for various policy types including health, motor, travel, and life insurance. Integrate with FastAPI backend to manage CRUD operations on the policy data.

epics.title: User Interface for Browsing Policies
epics.summary: Develop the UI for browsing and comparing insurance policies.
epics.description: Create a responsive user interface using React that allows users to browse, filter, and compare insurance policies. Implement components to display policy details, premiums, coverage, and benefits in an intuitive and user-friendly manner.

epics.title: Online Policy Purchase
epics.summary: Develop an online purchasing system for insurance policies.
epics.description: Implement a secure online purchasing system using React for the frontend and FastAPI for the backend. Integrate payment gateway APIs for handling transactions. Ensure that after successful purchase, digital policy documents are generated and sent to the user.

epics.title: User Account Management
epics.summary: Develop the user account management features for policy history, renewals, and claims.
epics.description: Create an account management module in React for displaying policy history, handling renewals, and tracking claims. Integrate with FastAPI backend to fetch and update account data stored in PostgreSQL. Implement secure profile management features.

epics.title: Administrator Dashboard
epics.summary: Implement dashboards for administrators and insurers to manage products, pricing, customers, policies, and claims.
epics.description: Develop comprehensive dashboards using React for administrators and insurance providers. Build backend services with FastAPI to support managing products, pricing, customer data, policies, and claims. Ensure data integrity and secure access to sensitive information stored in PostgreSQL.

epics.title: Agent Onboarding and Policy Approvals
epics.summary: Create features for agent onboarding and policy approval workflows.
epics.description: Implement workflows for onboarding insurance agents and handling policy approvals using React for the frontend and FastAPI for the backend services. Ensure secure handling of agent data and approval process information in PostgreSQL.

epics.title: Analytics and Reporting
epics.summary: Develop analytics and reporting features for administrators and insurers.
epics.description: Build the analytics and reporting module using React for the frontend visualization and FastAPI for backend data aggregation. Ensure efficient querying and reporting using PostgreSQL. Provide actionable insights and key metrics through interactive dashboards.

epics.title: Scalability and Performance Optimization
epics.summary: Ensure the platform is scalable and performs optimally under heavy load.
epics.description: Implement scalability and performance optimization techniques on both frontend (React) and backend (FastAPI). Optimize PostgreSQL database queries and indexing. Consider load balancing, caching strategies, and code optimizations to ensure smooth user experience.

epics.title: Mobile-Friendly Design
epics.summary: Ensure the platform is fully responsive and mobile-friendly.
epics.description: Adapt the entire user interface developed in React to be fully responsive and mobile-friendly. Ensure all features are accessible and performant on various mobile devices. Implement mobile-specific optimizations where necessary.

epics.title: Security Enhancements
epics.summary: Implement advanced security features for the digital insurance platform.
epics.description: Enhance the security of the platform by implementing features such as two-factor authentication, secure password policies, data encryption in the PostgreSQL database, and regular security audits. Ensure compliance with industry standards and best practices using FastAPI and React.

user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to be able to register on the platform with my details, so that I can have access to the system.

Core Domain Objects:
- User
- Registration
- Profile

Attributes & Rules:
- Must include fields: username, password, email
- Passwords must be hashed
- Email verification required

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successful registration
Given a new user
When they submit registration details
Then their account should be created successfully
And they should receive a verification email

Scenario: Duplicate email
Given a new user
When they submit an email that is already registered
Then the system should reject the registration
And display a duplicate email error

Scenario: Weak password
Given a new user
When they submit a weak password
Then the registration should be rejected
And a suggestion for a stronger password should be displayed

And they should receive a verification email

Then the system should reject the registration
And display a duplicate email error

Scenario: Weak password
Given a new user
When they submit a weak password
Then the registration should be rejected
And a suggestion for a stronger password should be displayed

Priority: High - Ensures new users can access the system securely.

user_stories.title: Develop password management system
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to manage my password, so that I can update it periodically to keep my account secure.

Core Domain Objects:
- User
- Password
- Reset Token

Attributes & Rules:
- Password reset functionality
- Password update functionality
- Reset tokens must be time-limited
- Password strength validation

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Password reset
Given a user who forgot their password
When they request a password reset
Then they should receive a reset token via email
And use it to set a new password

Scenario: Password update
Given a logged-in user
When they attempt to change their password
Then their old password must be provided
And the new password must be validated for strength

Scenario: Expired reset token
Given a user with a reset token
When the token is expired
Then the system should reject the token
And prompt the user to request a new one

Scenario: Expired reset token
Given a user with a reset token
When the token is expired
Then the system should reject the token
And prompt the user to request a new one

Priority: Medium - Allows users to maintain account security.

user_stories.title: Integrate OAuth for social logins
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to log in using my social media accounts, so that I can conveniently access the system without creating a new account.

Core Domain Objects:
- User
- OAuth Token
- Profile

Attributes & Rules:
- Support multiple OAuth providers (e.g., Google, Facebook)
- Map OAuth login to existing profile if email matches
- Securely store OAuth access tokens

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: OAuth login success
Given a user with a social media account
When they initiate login via OAuth
Then they should be logged in successfully
And their profile information should be retrieved

Scenario: OAuth provider unavailability
Given a user trying to use OAuth login
When the OAuth provider is unavailable
Then the login should fail gracefully
And an error message should be displayed

Scenario: Account linking
Given a user with an existing profile
When they log in via OAuth
Then their OAuth account should be linked to their existing profile if the email matches

user_stories.title: Store user credentials and profile information securely using PostgreSQL
user_stories.description:
As a system, I want to store user credentials and profile information in a secure database, so that user data is protected.

Core Domain Objects:
- User
- Credentials
- Profile
- PostgreSQL

Attributes & Rules:
- Use PostgreSQL for data storage
- Encrypt sensitive data
- Ensure secure access controls on the database

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Secure storage
Given user credentials and profile information
When stored in the database
Then the data should be encrypted
And access should be controlled securely

Scenario: Data retrieval
Given encrypted data
When retrieved from the database
Then it should be decrypted securely
And made available to authorized components

Scenario: Access control violation
Given a wrong database access attempt
When unauthorized access is attempted
Then access should be denied
And an alert generated

Test Cases:

Feature: Secure Storage

Scenario: Secure storage
Given user credentials and profile information
When stored in the database
Then the data should be encrypted
And access should be controlled securely

Scenario: Data retrieval
Given encrypted data
When retrieved from the database
Then it should be decrypted securely
And made available to authorized components

Scenario: Access control violation
Given a wrong database access attempt
When unauthorized access is attempted
Then access should be denied
And an alert generated

Priority: High - Ensures user data is stored securely.

user_stories.epic_title: Develop the UI for browsing and comparing insurance policies.
user_stories.title: Create responsive user interface for browsing insurance policies
user_stories.description:
As an insurance policy shopper, I want a responsive user interface for browsing insurance policies, so that I can easily view and compare various policies.

Core Domain Objects:
- Insurance Policy
- User Interface

Attributes & Rules:
- Interface must be responsive and user-friendly
- Allow browsing through a list of insurance policies
- Design should adjust to various screen sizes

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Browse policies
Given I am on the insurance policy browsing page
When I access the page
Then I should be able to see a list of policies
And the interface should be responsive to my device's screen size

Scenario: View policy details
Given I am browsing policies
When I click on a specific policy
Then I should be able to view the details of that policy

Scenario: Compare policies
Given I am looking at a list of policies
When I select multiple policies to compare
Then I should see a comparison view that displays details side by side

Test Cases:

Then I should be able to see a list of policies
And the interface should be responsive to my device's screen size

When I click on a specific policy
Then I should be able to view the details of that policy

Scenario: Compare policies

When I select multiple policies to compare
Then I should see a comparison view that displays details side by side

user_stories.title: Develop insurance policy comparison feature
user_stories.description:
As an insurance policy shopper, I want to compare multiple insurance policies, so that I can make an informed decision about which policy is best for me.

Core Domain Objects:
- Insurance Policy
- Comparison View

Attributes & Rules:
- Allow selection of multiple policies for comparison
- Display comparison in a user-friendly manner
- Comparison view should include key attributes like premiums, coverage, and benefits

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Select policies for comparison
Given I am browsing policies
When I select multiple policies
Then I should see an option to compare those policies

Scenario: Display comparison view
Given I have selected policies for comparison
When I activate the comparison option

user_stories.description:
As a security officer, I want to perform regular security audits, so that we ensure continuous compliance with industry standards.

Core Domain Objects:
- Security Audit
- Report

Attributes & Rules:
- Audits should be performed quarterly.
- Audits should cover codebase, infrastructure, and third-party integrations.
- Findings should be documented and reported to the relevant teams.
